raw_benchmark_data.savage_commentary: Generated by scientific analysis, see below for brutal assessment

individual_commentary.ultrathink-interactive.md: Complexity score: 3.0/5. Goldilocks would be proud - not too simple, not too complex, just right. 673 lines? This isn't a command, it's a manifesto. Even War and Peace had better editing. 2537 estimated tokens. This command costs more to run than my student loans. Hope it's worth it. 1 thinking blocks - shows it can think before acting. Revolutionary! Pattern violations: XML_JAVASCRIPT_COMPLEXITY_EXPLOSION. Breaking rules like a rebellious teenager with a PhD.
individual_commentary.adhd-hyperfocus-guardian.md: Complexity score: 2.5/5. Goldilocks would be proud - not too simple, not too complex, just right. 457 lines. Someone clearly gets paid by the line of code. Or has commitment issues. Zero thinking blocks detected. Apparently this command believes in 'shoot first, think never.' No pattern violations detected. Either well-behaved or sneaky enough to hide the evidence. Abstraction level: 2/5. About as abstract as a brick. Sometimes that's exactly what you need.
individual_commentary.adaptive-complexity-router.md: This command has a complexity score of 4.5/5. That's not 'intelligent design', that's what happens when you let a caffeinated PhD student loose on XML tags. 499 lines. Someone clearly gets paid by the line of code. Or has commitment issues. 25 thinking blocks. This command thinks more than a philosophy PhD defending their dissertation. No pattern violations detected. Either well-behaved or sneaky enough to hide the evidence. Abstraction level: 5/5. So abstract it makes modern art look concrete.
